sql.if: AND (D.IN_TIME IS NULL OR D.OUT_TIME IS NULL)
AND D.IN_TIME IS NOT NULL AND D.OUT_TIME IS NOT NULL

mapper.sql:
SELECT HR.LOCAL_NAME, HR.EMPID, HR.PERSON_ID, HR.CPNY_ID, HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE, HR.DEPTNO, TO_CHAR(HR.DATE_LEFT, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS DATE_LEFT, GET_DEPT_NAME(HR.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPTNAME, GET_DEPT_NAME(GET_DEPT_NO_BY_LEVEL(HR.DEPTNO, HR.CPNY_ID, '2'), #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_TEAM, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HR.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NO_NAME, AR.DDATE_STR AS AR_DATE_STR, AR.DDATE_STR AS DDATE_STR, GET_AR_SHIFTNO(HR.PERSON_ID, AR.DDATE_STR, HR.CPNY_ID) AS SHIFT_NO, MS.IN_TIME, MS.OUT_TIME FROM HR_EMPLOYEE HR JOIN SUPERVISED_DEPT SD ON SD.DEPTNO = HR.DEPTNO JOIN AR_CALENDER AR ON AR.CPNY_ID = HR.CPNY_ID LEFT JOIN MAC_SUMMARY MS ON MS.PERSON_ID = HR.PERSON_ID AND MS.AR_DATE_STR = AR.DDATE_STR WHERE HR.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HR.EMPID NOT LIKE '111111%' AND HR.EMP_TYPE_CODE <> '10418' AND AR.DDATE_STR >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND AR.DDATE_STR <= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD')
AND (UPPER(HR.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HR.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%')
AND INSTR(',' || #{deptNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ',', ',' || TO_CHAR(HR.DEPTNO) || ',') > 0
mapper.select: WITH MAC_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT PERSON_ID, AR_DATE_STR, MIN(CASE WHEN DOOR_TYPE = 'IN' THEN R_TIME END) AS IN_TIME, MAX(CASE WHEN DOOR_TYPE IS NULL OR DOOR_TYPE != 'IN' THEN R_TIME END) AS OUT_TIME FROM AR_MAC_RECORDS_HTSV WHERE R_TIME >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND R_TIME <= TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 2 GROUP BY PERSON_ID, AR_DATE_STR ), SUPERVISED_DEPT AS ( SELECT DISTINCT DEPTNO FROM AR_SUPERVISOR_INFO WHERE PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM () D WHERE (D.DATE_LEFT IS NULL OR D.DATE_LEFT >= D.DDATE_STR)

WITH MAC_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT PERSON_ID, AR_DATE_STR, MIN(CASE WHEN DOOR_TYPE = 'IN' THEN R_TIME END) AS IN_TIME, MAX(CASE WHEN DOOR_TYPE IS NULL OR DOOR_TYPE != 'IN' THEN R_TIME END) AS OUT_TIME FROM AR_MAC_RECORDS_HTSV WHERE R_TIME >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND R_TIME <= TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 2 GROUP BY PERSON_ID, AR_DATE_STR ), SUPERVISED_DEPT AS ( SELECT DISTINCT DEPTNO FROM AR_SUPERVISOR_INFO WHERE PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT INNER_Q.*, ROWNUM AS RN FROM ( SELECT D.LOCAL_NAME, D.EMPID, D.DEPTNAME, D.DEPT_TEAM, D.POST_GRADE_NO_NAME, D.EMP_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(D.EMP_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS EMP_TYPE_NAME, DECODE(D.EMP_TYPE_CODE, '10418', GET_GLOBAL_NAME(D.EMP_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) AS REMAX, D.SHIFT_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(D.SHIFT_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SHIFT_NAME, GET_AR_SHIFTNO_WORKTIME(D.SHIFT_NO) AS SHIFT_TIME, GET_AR_EATDEDUCT_TIMES(D.AR_DATE_STR, D.AR_DATE_STR, D.PERSON_ID, 'EAT_TIME') AS EAT_TIMES, (SELECT GET_GLOBAL_NAME(E.LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || ' (' || TO_CHAR(E.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') || ' - ' || TO_CHAR(E.LEAVE_TO_TIME, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') || ')' FROM ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB E WHERE E.CPNY_ID = D.CPNY_ID AND E.ACTIVITY = '1' AND E.BATCH_YN <> '2' AND E.CONFIRM_FLAG <> '2' AND E.AFFIRM_FLAG NOT IN ('14014310', '14014309') AND E.PERSON_ID = D.PERSON_ID AND D.DDATE_STR BETWEEN TO_CHAR(E.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_CHAR(E.LEAVE_TO_TIME - 8 / 24, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND ROWNUM = 1) AS LEAVE_CONTENT, (SELECT GET_EMP_LOCAL_NAME(ARS.CREATED_BY, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || ' ' || TO_CHAR(ARS.CREATE_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') FROM AR_SCHEDULE_HTSV ARS WHERE ARS.PERSON_ID = D.PERSON_ID AND ARS.AR_DATE_STR = D.AR_DATE_STR) AS CHANGE_SHIFT_PERSON, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(D.AR_DATE_STR, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS AR_DATE_STR, D.DDATE_STR, TO_CHAR(D.IN_TIME, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS IN_DAY, TO_CHAR(D.IN_TIME, 'HH24:MI') AS IN_TIME, TO_CHAR(D.OUT_TIME, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS OUT_DAY, TO_CHAR(D.OUT_TIME, 'HH24:MI') AS OUT_TIME FROM () D WHERE (D.DATE_LEFT IS NULL OR D.DATE_LEFT >= D.DDATE_STR)
ORDER BY D.DDATE_STR DESC, D.IN_TIME ) INNER_Q WHERE ROWNUM <= #{start, jdbcType=INTEGER} + #{length, jdbcType=INTEGER} ) WHERE RN > #{start, jdbcType=INTEGER}
